rows.target_identity: No likelihood target; governance matrix for later phases.
Exact LGSSM likelihood and score in the declared unconstrained parameter vector.
rows.reference_route: Exact Kalman value and score; dense references are explanatory only.
rows.candidate_cut4_route: CUT4 evaluator on the same linear-Gaussian structural target.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: Fixed-design TT evaluator on the same linear-Gaussian structural target.
rows.parameterization: unconstrained vector declared by M1 fixture
rows.parameter_vector: transition, observation, covariance, and initial-law parameters frozen by M1
rows.transform: covariance/stability transforms must match Kalman reference
rows.fixed_parameters: deterministic observations and seeds declared by M1
rows.dimension_convention: dims 1--3; product-panel dims unless a coupled target is explicitly declared
rows.claim_class: P42 Class A candidate after exact Kalman value and score pass

rows.target_identity: x_t = rho x_{t-1} + eta_t; y_t = x_t + a x_t^3 + epsilon_t with Gaussian initial, transition, and observation noise.
rows.reference_route: Dense quadrature refinement on tiny horizons; exact Kalman only for nested a=0 check.
rows.candidate_cut4_route: CUT4 approximation of the same nonlinear additive-Gaussian observation target.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: Fixed-design TT approximation of the same nonlinear additive-Gaussian observation target.
rows.parameterization: rho, cubic coefficient a, noise scales, and initial-law parameters declared by M2
rows.parameter_vector: same ordering for dense, CUT4, and Zhao--Cui evaluators
rows.transform: scale/stability transforms and cubic coefficient transform must be declared before score comparison
rows.fixed_parameters: tiny horizons, deterministic observations, seeds, dense order, CUT4 cap, and TT design fixed by M2
rows.dimension_convention: dims 1--3 as independent product panels unless M2 adds a coupled target
rows.claim_class: P42 Class B approximation-gap candidate; Class A only if dense-refined tolerance passes

rows.target_identity: x_t = rho x_{t-1} + eta_t; y_t = x_t^2 + epsilon_t with symmetric observation map.
rows.reference_route: Dense quadrature refinement with explicit symmetric-mode coverage.
rows.candidate_cut4_route: CUT4 approximation of the same quadratic additive-Gaussian observation target.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: Fixed-design TT approximation of the same quadratic additive-Gaussian observation target.
rows.parameterization: rho, noise scales, and initial-law parameters declared by M3
rows.parameter_vector: same ordering for dense, CUT4, and Zhao--Cui evaluators
rows.transform: scale/stability transforms must match; stationary-point score checks need absolute and directional criteria
rows.fixed_parameters: tiny horizons, symmetric observations, dense grid/order, CUT4 augmented dimension cap <= 6 unless reviewed
rows.dimension_convention: dims 1--3 as independent product panels unless M3 adds a coupled target
rows.claim_class: P42 Class B approximation-gap stress diagnostic; Class A only if dense-refined multimodal target passes

rows.target_identity: x_t = f(x_{t-1}; theta) + eta_t; y_t = H x_t + epsilon_t with additive Gaussian transition and observation noise.
rows.reference_route: Dense or sequential quadrature refinement on tiny horizons with nested c=0 LGSSM check.
rows.candidate_cut4_route: CUT4 approximation of the same nonlinear transition target.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: Fixed-design TT approximation of the same nonlinear transition target.
rows.parameterization: rho, nonlinear coefficient c, observation matrix/scale, transition scale, and initial-law parameters declared by M4
rows.parameter_vector: same ordering for dense/sequential, CUT4, and Zhao--Cui evaluators
rows.transform: stability/scale transforms and branch/floor/clipping events must be surfaced
rows.fixed_parameters: T <= 4, CPU-only tests, CUT4 augmented dimension <= 6, deterministic observations and seeds
rows.dimension_convention: dims 1--3 as independent product panels unless M4 adds a coupled target
rows.claim_class: P42 Class B approximation-gap candidate after nested LGSSM pass and dense refinement

rows.target_identity: Small clean-room additive-Gaussian diagnostic closure for spatial SIR; not native SIR likelihood.
rows.reference_route: SIR model-contract tests, RK4/small-step checks, and finite closure diagnostics.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: Matched Zhao--Cui diagnostic target only if M5 declares the same closure; otherwise blocked.
rows.state_dimension: smallest closure, J <= 1 under overnight cap
rows.parameterization: fixed closure parameters declared by M5
rows.parameter_vector: no equality score vector until matched closure target is declared
rows.transform: population/domain guards required; no native transform claim
rows.fixed_parameters: CPU-only, tiny closure, CUT4 augmented dimension <= 6
rows.dimension_convention: diagnostic closure dimensions only; no paper-scale spatial grid

rows.target_identity: Tiny additive-Gaussian predator-prey diagnostic closure; not paper-scale predator-prey validation.
rows.reference_route: Current predator-prey model-contract tests and matched diagnostic closure fixtures.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: Matched Zhao--Cui diagnostic target only if M6 declares the same closure; otherwise blocked.
rows.state_dimension: existing two-state fixture under overnight cap
rows.parameterization: fixed closure parameters declared by M6
rows.parameter_vector: no equality score vector until matched closure target is declared
rows.transform: ODE domain and positivity guards required

rows.target_identity: Unresolved generalized SV target y_t = beta s_t + exp(h_t/2) epsilon_t with latent states (s_t, h_t).
rows.reference_route: Blocked until target-definition table selects native, mixture, transformed-residual, moment-matched, or diagnostic-only route.
rows.candidate_cut4_route: No same-target equality test until observation law, state laws, dependence, Jacobians, and reference route are declared.
rows.candidate_zhao_cui_route: No same-target equality test until the same declared target is available to Zhao--Cui/fixed-design TT.
rows.state_dimension: at least 2 per series: s_t and h_t; dims 1--3 only after target decision
rows.parameter_vector: blocked pending transition laws, observation law, transforms, and fixed parameters
rows.transform: Jacobian terms required for transformed-residual routes; none only with justification
rows.dimension_convention: not approved for equality rows until target-definition review passes
rows.claim_class: P42 Class D until shared target is defined; possible Class B/A only after separate review

rows.target_identity: No new likelihood target; synthesis of phase statuses, claim classes, and blockers.
rows.reference_route: Traceability audit over M0--M7 result notes, review ledgers, manifests, and command logs.
